`423a55dc` is implemented in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_423a55dc/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_423a55dc/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_423a55dc/generator.py#L62). The rule is: keep the bottom row of the single foreground object fixed, and shift every higher row left by its distance from that bottom row. I found no `423a55dc` entry in either summary-hint file, so the rule was inferred directly from the official examples and no `notes.md` was needed.

The generator builds compact single-color row-profile shapes with monotone side boundaries and optional interior gaps, then derives the output directly from that row-shift transform. No new shared primitive was added.

Verification passed end to end: `6/6` official examples, shared build with `1000` generated examples, and `1000/1000` generated-example verification.
